settings.content_html:
Elevate Your Lighting Design with Ceiling Roses

When it comes to lighting design, every detail matters. One often-overlooked yet essential component is the ceiling rose.

At LEDsone, we focus on high-quality lighting products. We offer pendant lights, wall lights, and lampshades. We also provide cables, wire connectors, and LED modules, and if you need a ceiling rose light fitting, a rose ceiling pendant, or a large ceiling rose light, LEDsone has what you need.

Types of Ceiling Roses

Ceiling roses are available in a wide range of designs to suit different tastes and needs. Here are some popular types:

1. Decorative Ceiling Roses

These are designed to enhance the visual appeal of your ceiling. They often feature intricate patterns and are perfect for adding a touch of elegance to your space. Examples include:

  • Antique Brass Ceiling Rose: Ideal for vintage or traditional interiors.
  • White Ceiling Rose: A versatile option that blends seamlessly with any decor.

2. Functional Ceiling Roses

These are designed to support and conceal wiring for light fixtures. They are often used in combination with ceiling rose light fittings or ceiling rose pendants.

3. Material-Based Options

  • Brass Ceiling Rose: Durable and timeless, perfect for adding a touch of luxury.
  • Chrome Ceiling Rose: Sleek and modern, ideal for contemporary spaces.
  • Large Ceiling Rose Light Fitting: Makes a bold statement in grand spaces.

Applications of Ceiling Roses

Ceiling roses are incredibly versatile and can be used in various ways to enhance your lighting design. Here are some common applications:

1. Ceiling Rose Light Fitting

A ceiling rose light fitting is a practical solution for mounting light fixtures while concealing wires. It ensures a clean and polished look for your ceiling.

2. Rose Ceiling Pendant

Pairing a ceiling rose with a pendant light creates a stunning focal point in any room. Combining a rose ceiling pendant and a decorative ceiling rose adds style and functionality.

3. Ceiling Light Rose

A ceiling light rose integrates seamlessly with ceiling lights, providing a cohesive and elegant look. It's perfect for spaces where you want the lighting to blend in with the decor.

4. Large Ceiling Rose Light Fitting

A large ceiling rose light fitting is an excellent choice for grand spaces or statement lighting. It adds drama and sophistication to high ceilings or spacious rooms.

Welcome to the definitive guide to Ceiling Roses – the essential element that transforms a simple light fitting into a statement piece. Whether you're renovating, building new, or simply updating your home décor, our extensive collection of ceiling roses offers the perfect blend of aesthetic appeal and practical functionality. From discreet single outlets to elaborate multi-point designs, and from classic round shapes to modern rectangular forms, discover how the right ceiling rose can perfectly complement your chandeliers, pendant lights, and wall fittings.

Ceiling roses are more than just a cover for electrical connections; they are integral to your lighting's design, adding elegance, vintage charm, or contemporary sleekness. Dive into our hand-picked selection featuring durable metal construction, easy installation, and a variety of finishes to match every interior style.

Single Outlet Front Fitting Round Metal Ceiling Roses

These front-fitting ceiling roses provide a secure and stylish single outlet for pendant lights and chandeliers. Made from high-quality metal, they offer a smooth surface and come with matching screws for easy installation, perfect for new builds or refurbishments.

100mm Front Fitting Ceiling Hook Single Point Outlet

This 100mm metal front fitting ceiling rose with a hook ring is an ideal replacement for existing roses or for new installations. Features a smooth surface and includes all necessary screws for secure mounting. Perfect for industrial, modern, or retro styles.

75mm Front Fitting Ceiling Hook With Single Point Outlet

A high-quality 75mm metal front fitting ceiling hook, ideal for light fittings and pendant lighting. Provides a smooth finish and comes with matching screws for easy, secure installation. Elevates any room with industrial, modern, or retro appeal.

100mm Single Outlet Ceiling Rose Kit with Fixing Plate

This vintage-style, 100mm round metal ceiling rose offers a single outlet and is electroplated for a quality finish. Easy to install and comes with a 3-year warranty, perfect for industrial or retro interior designs.

Frequently Asked Questions about Front Fitting Ceiling Roses

What are the benefits of a front fitting ceiling rose?

Front fitting ceiling roses are designed for straightforward installation where the electrical connections are made directly within the rose. This often results in a very clean, flush look against the ceiling, making them a popular choice for modern and minimalist interiors. They are typically easy to access for wiring and provide a secure mounting point.

How do I choose the right size of single outlet ceiling rose?

When selecting the size of your single outlet ceiling rose, consider the size of your light fitting and the overall room aesthetics. A 100mm diameter is versatile, while a 75mm might suit smaller spaces or lighter pendants. Always check the weight capacity to ensure it can safely support your chosen light fixture, typically up to 5kg for most standard metal roses.

Can these metal ceiling roses support heavy light fittings?

Most standard metal ceiling roses, including our front-fitting models, are designed to safely suspend loads up to 5kg (12lbs). For heavier chandeliers or light fittings, it's crucial to check the product specifications for exact weight limits and ensure the rose is securely screwed into ceiling joists by a qualified electrician.

Single Outlet Side Fitting Round Metal Ceiling Roses

Our side-fitting round metal ceiling roses offer a classic and elegant solution for suspending your light fixtures. These decorative elements add distinctive detail to any ceiling, providing a secure mount for chandeliers and pendant lights with up to 5kg weight capacity.

108mm Side Fitting Single Outlet Ceiling Rose

This 108mm diameter side-fitting ceiling rose is a decorative element ideal for hanging chandeliers and light fittings. Made from metallic iron with plating, it has a 5kg weight capacity and features a riveted construction with an earth tag.

Metal Round Ceiling Rose Mounting Plate for Light Fitting

An excellent quality round metal ceiling rose with cord grip, perfect for home or commercial spaces. With a 100mm diameter and 20mm depth, it's designed for light fittings and chandeliers, available in various colours including copper.

Yellow Brass Ceiling Rose With Hook Pendant Light Fitting

A brand new multi-point ceiling rose with a hook, excellent for home or commercial use. This 120mm diameter round metal rose comes with cord grips and a ceiling bracket, available in yellow brass and other colours.

Frequently Asked Questions about Side Fitting Ceiling Roses

What distinguishes a side-fitting ceiling rose from a front-fitting one?

The primary difference lies in how the electrical cables enter the rose. For side-fitting ceiling roses, cables typically emerge from the side or bottom, often through cord grips, allowing for a more traditional draped pendant look. Front-fitting roses usually conceal connections more directly within the unit for a flush finish.

Are these metal round ceiling roses suitable for all room styles?

Absolutely! Our metal round ceiling roses are incredibly versatile. Available in various finishes like copper, black, and yellow brass, they can complement a wide range of interior styles, from vintage industrial and retro to modern minimalist and traditional country aesthetics.

What's the typical weight capacity for side-fitting ceiling roses?

Similar to front-fitting designs, most side-fitting ceiling roses are engineered to safely suspend loads up to 5kg (12lbs). It's always best practice to verify the specific weight capacity listed in the product details and ensure the fixture is installed by a professional into ceiling joists for maximum safety.

Multi-Outlet & Rectangular/Square Metal Ceiling Roses

For those requiring multiple light drops or unique aesthetic touches, our collection includes rectangular, square, and multi-hole round ceiling roses. These versatile fittings are perfect for creating custom pendant clusters or contemporary wall-mounted light arrangements, offering both style and functionality.

2-5 Outlet Rectangular Ceiling Rose

A rectangular shaped plated metal ceiling rose, complete with accessories for multi-light fittings and chandeliers. Supports up to 5kg weight capacity and includes an earth lead for UK wiring compliance, making it ideal for creating custom lighting arrays.

Multi Colour 3 Hole Ceiling Rose for Pendant Wall Lamp

This round, multi-colour metal ceiling rose features three holes, perfect for creating dynamic pendant light arrangements or chandeliers. Its vintage industrial design adds retro charm, while the sturdy construction ensures safe hanging.

Vintage Multi Colour Metal Ceiling Rose Wall Mount

A unique square-shaped metal ceiling rose, designed for vintage industrial aesthetics. This kit includes a ceiling plate cover and sturdy chassis base, offering versatile hanging styles for pendant lights or chandeliers, and comes with all necessary hardware.

Frequently Asked Questions about Multi-Outlet Ceiling Roses

How do multi-outlet ceiling roses enhance lighting design?

Multi-outlet ceiling roses are fantastic for creating bespoke lighting arrangements, such as pendant clusters or linear displays. They allow you to suspend multiple light sources from a single ceiling point, adding depth, focus, and intricate design elements that can transform the ambiance of any room, from kitchens to dining rooms.

Can I use a rectangular ceiling rose with any pendant light?

Rectangular ceiling roses are compatible with most pendant lights, provided they use a compatible cord grip system. They are particularly effective for arranging multiple pendants in a line over kitchen islands or dining tables. Always check the number of outlets and the cord grip compatibility of the ceiling rose with your chosen pendant cables.

What are the benefits of using specialty shaped ceiling roses?

Specialty shaped ceiling roses, like rectangular or square designs, offer a modern twist on traditional lighting installations. They provide a unique visual interest, can complement specific architectural styles, and are excellent for creating a contemporary, custom look that stands out from standard round fittings. They are ideal for designers seeking to make a statement.

Versatile & Unique Metal Ceiling Rose Designs

Discover ceiling roses designed for specific needs, including weather-resistant options for outdoor use, elegant multi-point black finishes for intricate pendant arrangements, and convenient multi-packs for larger projects or bulk replacements. These unique fittings combine durability with distinct style.

80mm Metal Rainproof Single Outlet Ceiling Rose for Outdoor Use

This 80mm metal rainproof ceiling rose is specially built for outdoor and semi-outdoor use. Its durable, smudge-resistant quality metal construction and classic industrial design make it perfect for porches, patios, and balconies.

Black Ceiling Rose for Pendant & Wall Lights

Upgrade your lighting with our sleek, durable multi-point black metal ceiling rose. Perfect for creating bold multi-pendant clusters or stylish wall fittings, combining modern style with lasting reliability in homes, cafés, or restaurants.

5 Pack Vintage Industrial Pendant Ceiling Rose

This convenient 5-pack of vintage industrial pendant ceiling roses is excellent for multiple fixtures in homes or commercial spaces. Round metal design with cord grips, 100mm diameter, available in various colours.

Frequently Asked Questions about Unique Ceiling Roses

Are there ceiling roses suitable for outdoor use?

Yes, for areas like porches, patios, or covered outdoor hallways, we offer specialized rainproof ceiling roses. For instance, the 80mm Metal Rainproof Single Outlet Ceiling Rose is designed with weather-resistant properties to ensure durability and safety in environments with some exposure to the elements.

Why choose a multi-pack of ceiling roses?

Multi-packs, like our 5-pack vintage industrial pendant ceiling roses, are ideal for larger lighting projects, renovations, or for stocking up on essential spares. They offer a cost-effective solution when you need several matching fittings, ensuring consistency in your design across multiple rooms or installations.

How do black metal ceiling roses complement different interiors?

Black metal ceiling roses provide a striking contrast and a touch of sophistication to various interior themes. They are particularly effective in industrial, modern, Scandinavian, and minimalist designs, offering a bold yet refined element that highlights your light fittings without overpowering the space.

settings.title: What is max weight this can hold?
settings.content: The ceiling rose can safely hold up to 5 kg when installed into a solid ceiling with appropriate fixings.

settings.title: Hello, are these heavy duty? What is the max. weight these hooks can carry please?
settings.content: Yes, they are sturdy. The hooks can hold up to 5 kg when properly fixed into a solid ceiling.

settings.title: Hello, how much weight does this item hold if I install 4 hooks?
settings.content: If evenly distributed and fixed into a solid surface, 4 hooks can collectively hold up to 20 kg (5 kg per hook).

settings.title: What else would I need besides the ceiling rose, which I assume has a fixing plate?
settings.content: You’ll need a compatible light fitting, electrical cable, ceiling fixings (screws and plugs), and tools for installation.

settings.title: Hi, what amp are the ceiling roses?
settings.content: The ceiling roses are rated at 6 A, suitable for standard UK lighting circuits.

settings.content_liquid:
Why Choose the Right Ceiling Rose?

Selecting the right ceiling rose is crucial for both aesthetic and functional reasons. Here’s why it matters:

  • Enhances Lighting Design: A well-chosen ceiling rose complements your light fixtures, whether it’s a ceiling rose pendant or a ceiling rose light.

  • Concealing Wiring: It hides unsightly wires, creating a clean and polished look.

  • Adds Personality: From an antique brass ceiling rose to a chrome ceiling rose, the right choice can reflect your style.

At LEDsone, we offer a wide range of ceiling roses to suit every need, ensuring you find the perfect match for your lighting design.

How to Install a Ceiling Rose

Installing a ceiling rose is a straightforward process, but it’s important to follow safety guidelines. Here’s a step-by-step guide:

  1. Turn Off the Power: Always switch off the electricity supply before starting any electrical work.

  2. Prepare the Wiring: Use wire connectors to secure the wiring. If you’re unsure, consult a professional electrician.

  3. Secure the Ceiling Rose: Attach the ceiling rose to the ceiling using screws or adhesive, depending on the type.

  4. Attach the Light Fixture: Connect your ceiling rose pendant or ceiling rose light to the rose.

  5. Test the Installation: Once everything is in place, turn the power back on and test the light.

For complex installations or large fixtures like a large ceiling rose light fitting, it’s best to seek professional help.

Styling Tips for Ceiling Roses

Here are some creative ways to incorporate ceiling roses into your lighting design:

  • Modern Spaces: Pair a chrome ceiling rose with sleek pendant lights for a contemporary look.

  • Vintage Interiors: Use an antique brass ceiling rose to add a touch of old-world charm.

  • Minimalist Decor: A white ceiling rose blends seamlessly with minimalist designs, creating a clean and timeless aesthetic.

  • Statement Lighting: Opt for a large ceiling rose light fitting to create a focal point in larger rooms or entryways.

Why Choose LEDsone for Your Ceiling Rose Needs?

At LEDsone, we’re passionate about helping you create the perfect lighting design. Here’s why you should choose us:

  • Wide Range of Options: From brass ceiling roses to chrome ceiling roses, we offer a variety of styles to suit every taste.

  • High-Quality Materials: Our ceiling roses are made from durable materials, ensuring longevity and performance.

  • Compatibility: Our products are designed to work seamlessly with other lighting components like pendant lights, wall lights, and LED modules.

  • Expert Advice: Our team is always ready to help you find the perfect ceiling rose for your space.

Conclusion

A ceiling rose is more than just a functional component—it’s a design element that can elevate your lighting and transform your space. Whether you’re looking for a ceiling rose light fitting, a rose ceiling pendant, or a large ceiling rose light fitting, LEDsone has the perfect solution for you. Explore our collection today and discover how the right ceiling rose can enhance your lighting design.


Visit LEDsone now to find the perfect ceiling rose for your home or workspace!
